lesson.title: 12 ENTREPRENEURSHIP IN SPORTS
topics: Entrepreneurship in sports is about using business ideas to create value in the world of sports. It
brings together the love for sports and the skills to start and grow businesses. Sports entrepreneurs
can be involved in many areas, such as organizing sports events, selling sportswear, running
gyms, or creating new sports apps.
activities: Branding: Creating and promoting a unique identity for a business or product.
Business Model: A plan for generating revenue and sustaining a business
Event management: Planning and executing sports events, such as tournaments or
Innovation: Introducing new or improved products, services, or processes to the sports
Investment: Funding providing to support a business or project.
Marketing Strategy: A plan for promoting a business or product.
resources:  Example: A sports startup focused only on developing high-quality sports apparel
might grow more successfully than one trying to do too much, such as managing
Sports businesses should prioritize profitability over social impact.”
